rationale: Mirrors the completed ENH-2607 precedent (extend an existing enrichment rule in place) and reuses Phase 3b's shared _phase_text() test-slice helper; avoids duplicating Phase 2.5's re-scan/re-branch machinery in a new phase.
rule: Option B: Extend Phase 3b's Resolution Logic in place to materialize informal decisions into Option A/B blocks, rather than adding a new Phase 3c
alternatives_rejected: Option A: new Phase 3c step (scored 8/12 vs Option B's 10/12) — would duplicate Phase 2.5's re-scan logic in a parallel construct
